race.comment: BLACKTHORN (5) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the two wins prior to start the career were good enough for a race of this calibre. Looks the runner in this field with the most upside and should be right there at the business end. BLUEBIRD BAY (3) got a well-deserved victory around this circuit at the latest effort and will have derived a stack of confidence from that win. Can go back-to-back. READY TIGER (1) last start finished 1.1 lengths back in third over 1609m at this track. Include in exotics. ROCK THE SUNRISE (4) is usually thereabouts and can contest for a place.
